description_long: This is a modern rectangular sink unit featuring a wide, white ceramic basin mounted atop a wooden vanity cabinet. The basin is deep with straight edges and includes a single faucet fixture in a sleek, metallic finish, positioned at the rear center. The vanity cabinet is constructed from wood with a natural grain finish and consists of three front-facing doors, likely providing storage space beneath the sink. The rear view reveals plumbing fixtures and mounting brackets, indicating robust installation and easy access for maintenance. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments such as public restrooms, commercial spaces, or upscale residential settings. The combination of materials and clean lines gives it a sophisticated yet practical appearance.
description: A modern rectangular white ceramic sink with a single faucet, mounted on a natural wood-grain vanity cabinet with three doors. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the white ceramic basin and the wood-grain finish of the vanity cabinet.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide basin, central faucet, and three-panel wooden cabinet doors.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the depth and material contrast between the basin and cabinet.
description_view_3: Rear view exposing the plumbing fixtures, mounting brackets, and open storage compartments inside the cabinet.
